# Stack Component Documentation

A flex layout wrapper that arranges children in a consistent vertical or horizontal stack with configurable gap spacing.

## Component API

### Props

- `direction: 'vertical' | 'horizontal'` — Flex direction (default: `'vertical'`)
- `gap: 'none' | 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'` — Gap between children (default: `'md'`)
- `align?: 'start' | 'center' | 'end' | 'stretch'` — Cross-axis alignment (`align-items`)
- `justify?: 'start' | 'center' | 'end' | 'between' | 'around'` — Main-axis justification (`justify-content`)
- `children: Snippet` — Content to stack (required)
- `class?: string` — Additional CSS classes on the root element

## DOM Structure

```html
<div data-stack data-direction="vertical" data-gap="md">
  <!-- children -->
</div>
```

## Usage Examples

### Vertical Stack (default)

```svelte
<script>
  import { Stack } from '@rokkit/ui'
</script>

<Stack gap="sm">
  <div>First item</div>
  <div>Second item</div>
  <div>Third item</div>
</Stack>
```

### Horizontal Stack

```svelte
<Stack direction="horizontal" gap="md" align="center">
  <Button>Cancel</Button>
  <Button variant="primary">Save</Button>
</Stack>
```

### Space Between

```svelte
<Stack direction="horizontal" justify="between" align="center">
  <h2>Title</h2>
  <Button>Action</Button>
</Stack>
```

## Gap Scale

| Value | CSS gap  |
|-------|----------|
| none  | 0        |
| xs    | 0.25rem  |
| sm    | 0.5rem   |
| md    | 1rem     |
| lg    | 1.5rem   |
| xl    | 2rem     |

## Styling Hooks

- `[data-stack]` — Root element
- `[data-stack][data-direction='vertical']` — Vertical layout
- `[data-stack][data-direction='horizontal']` — Horizontal layout
- `[data-stack][data-gap='sm']` etc. — Gap size variants
- `[data-stack][data-align='center']` etc. — Alignment variants
- `[data-stack][data-justify='between']` etc. — Justification variants
